summary: Crystal‑clear Neumann front‑of‑house capture that lets the nostalgic Shakedown Street moment shine.
review: All three reviewers rave about the recording’s clarity, noting the unusual but effective use of Neumann shotgun microphones up front. The performance itself is remembered fondly – even a brief mention of “Shakedown” (Shakedown Street) brings back vivid memories for listeners. Together the high‑fidelity capture and the warm nostalgia make this release an enjoyable listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (5, 5, 4) and uniformly positive comments about both sound quality and the musical experience drive a strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded with Neumann shotgun microphones positioned up front; reviewers describe the sound as "nice" and "sounds nice", highlighting clarity and an interesting mic approach.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; overall vibe described as a special, memorable night.
